relationships: ber:Tadamsa tazzayrit ad tuɣal ɣer unerni aseggas i d-itteddun
ber:Michael, segmi i yebda abrid ɣer taddart, netta yettru
ber:Ɣer-as i Tom akken ad am-d-yernu ifatusen
ber:Ad yesselmed tamaziɣt deg useggas aɣurbiz i d-itteddun
ber:D tameṭṭut n Tom i yessefraken tadrimt n twacult
ber:Tom ad as-d-iεawed taklut i uxxam-a
ber:Seg zik i yebɣa ad yesɛu weltma-s tamecṭuḥt
ber:Ayweq i yezmer ad d-yeqqel Tom ɣer uxxam﹖
